subject: App crashes every time I switch between projects
description: We have 12 people on our enterprise plan and every single one of them is experiencing an immediate crash when switching between projects. This started the day we updated to version 2.4. We cannot do our daily standups effectively. Please treat this as critical.

subject: Black screen on app launch - reproducible every cold start
description: After the 2.4 update our team reports a black screen for 20 to 40 seconds on every cold launch. Sometimes the app never finishes loading and must be force-closed. Affects both iOS and macOS users on our team.

subject: Dashboard load time regression - 2 seconds to 12 seconds
description: Prior to version 2.4 our dashboard loaded in under 2 seconds. It now takes between 10 and 15 seconds. We have approximately 90 active projects. This is blocking our morning review process every day.

subject: CSV export silently fails with no error message
description: The export to CSV feature stopped working entirely after the 2.4 update. When we click Export the spinner appears for a few seconds and then disappears with no file downloaded and no error message shown. We use CSV exports for monthly board reporting.

subject: Push notifications arriving 30 to 60 minutes late
description: Our distributed team across three time zones relies on push notifications for task updates. Since the latest update notifications consistently arrive 30 to 60 minutes after the event. Real-time collaboration is no longer possible.

subject: New users have no onboarding flow - high churn risk
description: We onboarded five new team members this week and all five contacted me within an hour asking how to get started. There is no welcome checklist
priority: and no contextual guidance. We are at risk of losing these seats.

subject: Project switch crash confirmed on iPhone 15 Pro and MacBook Pro
description: Engineering team internal report: project context switch triggers a null pointer exception in the project context handler. Reproducible 100 percent of the time on iOS 17.3 and macOS 14.2. Began in commit range 2.3.9 to 2.4.0.

subject: Black screen duration increases with number of open projects
description: Follow-up to TKT-4402. We have determined that the black screen duration on cold launch scales with the number of projects in the workspace. Users with fewer than 10 projects see 5 seconds. Users with 50 or more see 30 to 40 seconds.

subject: Export feature broken - missing critical monthly reports
description: This is a billing-level issue. Our finance team cannot produce monthly project cost reports because the CSV export fails silently. We have a board presentation in four days and need this resolved urgently.

subject: Dashboard unusable for enterprise accounts with 200+ projects
description: We are an enterprise customer with 247 active projects. The dashboard now takes 25 to 30 seconds to load. This makes morning team reviews impossible. We need the performance from version 2.3.9 restored.

subject: Resolved - occasional slow dashboard on smaller workspace
description: We experienced some dashboard slowness last week but after clearing the app cache it resolved itself. No longer an issue for our team of 8 with 15 projects. Closing this ticket.

subject: Notification delay makes task assignment alerts useless
description: When a task is assigned in our workspace the assignee receives the push notification anywhere from 20 minutes to an hour later. By that time the assignee has already been contacted via Slack. The notification serves no purpose at this latency.

subject: No getting started experience for new workspace members
description: We run a consulting firm and regularly add new client stakeholders to project workspaces. Every single new member is confused by the blank state with no guidance. A simple onboarding checklist or welcome modal would solve this immediately.

subject: Crash on project switch - data loss on unsaved work
description: The project switch crash is causing us to lose unsaved task descriptions and comments. We had a team member lose three hours of detailed project notes. There is no autosave and no crash recovery. This is a data integrity issue.

subject: CSV export broken for tasks milestones and reports
description: We have tested the export feature for task lists
priority: and project summary reports. None of the three export types produce a downloadable file. The loading indicator appears and then the UI returns to normal with nothing downloaded.

subject: Resolved - project switch worked fine after reinstall
description: We were seeing intermittent crashes on project switch but after uninstalling and reinstalling the app fresh (not from backup) the issue resolved. Team of 4 with 6 projects. May not apply to larger workspaces.

subject: Black screen regression introduced in 2.4 - request rollback
description: We have 35 users on our plan. The black screen on launch is affecting user confidence in the product. Three users have asked if the app is broken. We would like to know if a rollback to 2.3.9 is possible while the fix is prepared.

subject: Dashboard slowness confirmed as project count scaling issue
description: Our performance testing confirms the dashboard load time scales linearly with project count. At 50 projects: 6 seconds. At 100 projects: 12 seconds. At 200 projects: 24 seconds. This appears to be a missing database index or N+1 query issue.

subject: New member onboarding is a significant churn risk
description: Exit interview data: two users cited confusion during initial setup as a factor in their decision not to renew their seats. A structured onboarding flow with a checklist and a sample workspace would directly address this. This is now a retention issue for us.

subject: Resolved - notification delay fixed by re-enabling permissions
description: One of our users found that disabling and re-enabling notification permissions in iOS Settings resolved the 45-minute delay for their device. Not a scalable fix but may help others while the underlying issue is investigated.
